title: Il cielo è rosso
writer: Giuseppe Berto, Claudio Gora, Giuseppe Santilli
actors: Marina Berti, Jacques Sernas, Mischa Auer Jr.
plot: Daniele, a 16 year old boy, runs away from boarding school after a catastrophic bombing, only to find his home destroyed and his parents dead. Alone in the world he meets Tullio, a disbanded boy who lives in a refuge with some girls.
